name: Administradora General de Fondos Sura, S.A.-Fondo de Inversion Sura Renta Inmobiliara III
summary: Administradora General de Fondos Sura, S.A.-Fondo de Inversion Sura Renta Inmobiliara III is a real estate income investment fund. It is managed by Administradora General de Fondos Sura, S.A. and invests in income-generating real estate.
